name: python3-pyqt5.qsci
title: python3-pyqt5.qsci
summary: Python 3 bindings for QScintilla 2 with Qt 5
description:
Python 3 bindings for QScintilla 2 with Qt 5
QScintilla is a text editor for Qt5 with features especially useful when
writing and debugging source code. These include support for syntax
styling, error indicators, code completion, call tips and margins.
.
This package contains Python 3 bindings so QScintilla 2 can be used in
PyQt5 applications.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyqt5.qsci because Python 3 bindings for QScintilla 2 with Qt 5.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyqt5.qsci as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyqt5.qsci with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyqt5.qsci --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
